info.title: DropTracker Web API
info.description: Versioned, browser-oriented JSON API consumed by the Next.js BFF. Separate from the RuneLite intake API. See FRONTEND_PLAN.md §6.

get.summary: List events (drafts visible to event admins only)

post.summary: Create a draft event (group admin; superadmin for global)

200.description: Id of the created draft event.

get.summary: Event detail (tasks, teams, progress, bingo board)

200.description: Event detail payload. join_code appears only for event admins.

delete.summary: Delete a draft or ended event (event admin / superadmin)
delete.description: Permanently deletes the event and every row scoped to it. A live event must be ended first (409). The caller must echo the event's exact name in `confirm_name` (422 otherwise).

confirm_name.description: Must exactly match the event's name (explicit confirmation).

200.description: A page of group leaderboard entries.

get.summary: Player loot tracker (drops grouped by NPC for one month)

parameters.name: partition
parameters.description: YYYYMM month to show; defaults to the current month.

get.summary: Resolve a nice-URL slug to an entity, or to disambiguation candidates

200.description: Resolution result: a single match, or candidates for a disambiguation page.

get.summary: Current session: user, linked players, group roles
Public subscription-pool summary for a group (tier, pool total, next tier)
NPC overview (lifetime/month totals, top players, recent drops)
Wiki drop table with most-recent receiver per item
Item overview (totals, recent/top receivers, drop sources)

Period.name: period
Period.description: Time partition: YYYYMM (monthly), YYYYWW (weekly), YYYYMMDD (daily) or 'all'.

visibility.description: Event audience: 'public' (anyone) or 'private' (only participating-group members + event admins see it, at any status).

requires_confirmation.description: Event-level force: all completions queue for admin review.

submission_policy.description: Which submissions the completion engine accepts: 'all' — everything counts; 'confirm_non_api' — non-plugin submissions land as pending completions needing admin confirmation; 'api_only' — submissions without the plugin API flag are ignored.

visibility.description: How the task's reusable library copy is shared: public (any group may copy it) or private (owning group only).

config.description: JSON string: any_of/assembly/point_collection item lists etc.

color.description: Admin-assigned accent color ("#rrggbb"); null = frontend palette default.

join_code.description: Admin-only: present only when the requester administers the event.

visibility.description: Event audience: 'public' (anyone) or 'private' (only participating-group members + event admins see it, at any status).

EventPatch.description: Any subset of EventInput fields except group_id.

visibility.description: Event audience: 'public' (anyone) or 'private' (only participating-group members + event admins see it, at any status).

Money.description: GP value: raw integer plus a preformatted display string.

GroupFlair.description: Cosmetic subscription-tier display style for a group's name. Present only for groups with an active/trialing subscription to a tier whose flair is not 'none'.

delta.description: Recent change in GP (for live deltas).

drops.description: Distinct drop rows this item came from this month.

first_ts.description: Unix seconds of the first time this item was received this month.

last_ts.description: Unix seconds of the most recent time this item was received this month.

kills.description: Distinct drop events (multi-item kills counted once).

earliest_partition.description: First YYYYMM with tracked drops (month-picker lower bound).

date_ts.description: Unix seconds the record was set.

ranked_players.description: Total players on the global board, for percentile context.

canonical_slug.description: Pretty-URL slug this profile declares as canonical, or null when the name collides with another visible player (id url stays canonical).

icon_url.description: Group icon uploaded by a group admin (also used for social-card previews).

canonical_slug.description: Pretty-URL slug this group declares as canonical, or null when the name collides with another group (id url stays canonical).

created_ts.description: Groups only — unix seconds the group was created.

match.description: The single resolved entity, or null when ambiguous (candidates set) or not found (candidates empty).

GroupSubscriptionSummary.description: Subscription-pool summary: the tier a group's live contribution legs cover, the pool total, and what the next tier costs on top.

canonical_slug.description: Pretty-URL slug this NPC declares as canonical (duplicate names collapse to a primary id); null only if the name is unslugifiable.

last_drops_status.description: "building" while the last-received registry is cold-built in the background.

canonical_slug.description: Pretty-URL slug this item declares as canonical (name variants collapse to a primary id); null only if the name is unslugifiable.

stats_status.description: "building" while heavy aggregates are cold-built in the background.

TaskTileIcon.description: One icon of a task tile. `id` maps to /img/{itemdb|npcdb}/{id}.png; skill icons are keyed by name (/img/metrics/{name}.png) and carry id: null.

id.description: Game id for item/npc icons; null when unresolved or for skills.

quantity.description: Required count shown as a chip on the icon (present when > 1).

TaskTile.description: Display metadata for a task's board tile: resolved icon refs plus a legacy-style badge ("KC TARGET", "FULL SET", ...) and short value string ("100.00M GP"). The frontend composes tile art from these.

icon_overflow.description: Icons dropped past the server-side cap; render as a +N chip.
